sql.regional_risk_table: SELECT d."A3" AS region, COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) AS client_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status IN ('C','D') THEN l.loan_id END) AS active_loan_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status = 'B' THEN l.loan_id END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status IN ('A','B') THEN l.loan_id END), 0) AS finished_default_rate, AVG(d."A11") AS avg_branch_salary FROM district d LEFT JOIN client c ON c.district_id = d.district_id LEFT JOIN disp dp ON dp.client_id = c.client_id LEFT JOIN loan l ON l.account_id = dp.account_id GROUP BY d."A3" ORDER BY d."A3";
sql.regional_default_rate_bar: SELECT d."A3" AS region, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status = 'B' THEN l.loan_id END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN l.status IN ('A','B') THEN l.loan_id END), 0) AS finished_default_rate FROM district d LEFT JOIN client c ON c.district_id = d.district_id LEFT JOIN disp dp ON dp.client_id = c.client_id LEFT JOIN loan l ON l.account_id = dp.account_id GROUP BY d."A3" ORDER BY finished_default_rate DESC NULLS LAST;

chart_spec.layout_intent: table dominant view with risk-rate bar beside it
